title: Technology and Our Choices
article_text: Our society today has a big demand for new technology. We often make a choice to accept or reject new ideas. Some people say technology can save time, but it also takes effort to learn. A common problem is the material we use, like plastic, which can hurt the air. We must check the total cost of new tech before we buy it. Due to this, we need to limit our use of some things. I listen to my friend, and she always mentions the security of our data. There is a wrong idea that technology has no culture. Upon a closer look, we can see the benefit of making a good trade. With some attention, we can put our foot forward and make a change.

sentences.en: Our society today has a big demand for new technology.
sentences.zh: 我们当今社会对新技术有很大的需求。

image_prompts: A busy city scene showing many people using smartphones and computers, representing society and technology.
A person standing at a crossroads with two signs: 'Accept' and 'Reject', showing a choice.
A person using a laptop with a clock nearby, showing time saved, and a tired face showing effort.
A pile of plastic bottles and bags with dirty air around, showing common material problems.
A person looking at a price tag on a new phone, with a calculator showing total cost.
A hand holding a stop sign with the word 'Limit' on it, with many objects around.
Two friends talking, one listening carefully, with a shield icon representing security.
A brain with a question mark, and cultural symbols like a dragon and a castle, showing wrong ideas.
Two people shaking hands over a table with money and goods, showing a good trade.
A person stepping forward with one foot, and a light bulb above the head, showing attention and change.
